creator: jilles@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mathieu Arnold from comment #3)
Yes, I'm planning to change /bin/sh's -c so it matches what the rest of the world does nowadays, and this breaks some code in bsd.port.mk and three versions of the ruby port. My grepping over /usr/ports did not find other instances, but it is possible that code from distfiles contains some.
